---
title: "SSC for a Two-Arms Group-Sequential-Design with Binary endpoints"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
source("../quarto-setup.R")
```

## Pooled-Variance

```{r}
x_pooled <- read_rds("../outputs/comp_bin_gs_pooled.rds")
```

```{r}
datatable(x_pooled$n_ratio)
```

```{r}
x_pooled$tables$table_n_ratio
```

```{r}
x_pooled$plots$p_n_ratio
```
